testcase.name: @stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > hydrates, derives, expires, and clears frontend sessions
@stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > supports custom claim keys and invalid token fallbacks
@stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > derives tenant identifiers from fallback claims and empty claims
@stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > stores tokens in memory and browser-local storage variants
@stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > uses global localStorage when no storage provider is supplied
@stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > falls back to unavailable storage when global localStorage is absent
@stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > evaluates frontend authorization helpers case-insensitively
@stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > builds Cognito URLs and parses JWT payloads
@stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > sends StynxApiClient requests with auth, tenant, body, query, and response variants
@stynx-web/sdk runtime helpers > surfaces StynxApiClient error responses
@stynx-web/sdk transport > injects bearer and tenant headers on requests
@stynx-web/sdk transport > preserves caller headers and omits empty query and tenant values
@stynx-web/sdk transport > omits empty query strings and forwards request signal options
@stynx-web/sdk transport > uses client method default options and parses empty or inferred JSON bodies
@stynx-web/sdk transport > refreshes once after a 401 and replays the request
@stynx-web/sdk transport > maps response codes to typed error instances and calls onAuthFailure after unrecoverable 401
@stynx-web/sdk transport > preserves content-type headers and surfaces repeated 401 responses after refresh
@stynx-web/sdk transport > maps remaining status codes and validation code suffixes
@stynx-web/sdk transport > maps context payloads and 401 responses without an auth provider
